    -v /home/xukun/projects/mase-kd:/workspace \\
    -w /workspace \\
    -e TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM=false \\
    deepwok/mase-docker-cpu:latest \\
    python3 experiments/scripts/run_bert_kd.py \\

Bash(python -c "
from mase_kd.passes.prune_pass import PrunePass, PruneConfig, compute_model_sparsity
from mase_kd.passes.export_pass import ExportMetricsPass
from mase_kd.passes.pipeline import ResNetPipeline, BertPipeline, YoloPipeline
from mase_kd.vision.resnet_kd import ResNetKDConfig, build_cifar_resnet18, ResNetKDTrainer
from mase_kd.config.schema import VisionKDConfig, ResNetKDConfig as SchemaResNetKDConfig
print\('All imports OK'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(docker exec -w /workspace mase-dev-kd python3 -m pytest cw/unit/test_passes.py cw/unit/test_config_schema.py -v 2>&1 | tail -60)
Bash(docker exec -w /workspace mase-dev-kd python3 -m pytest cw/integration/test_resnet_smoke.py -v 2>&1 | tail -50)

Bash(docker exec -w /workspace \\
    -e PYTHONPATH=/workspace/src \\
    -e TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM=false \\
    mase-dev-kd bash -c "
set -e
echo '===== sparsity 0.5 =====' && \\
python3 -m mase_kd.runners.run_pipeline \\
    --model resnet18 --dataset cifar10 \\
    --profile full --sparsity 0.5 --seed 0 \\
    --output-dir outputs/resnet18/cifar10 && \\
echo '===== sparsity 0.7 =====' && \\
python3 -m mase_kd.runners.run_pipeline \\
    --model resnet18 --dataset cifar10 \\
    --profile full --sparsity 0.7 --seed 0 \\
    --output-dir outputs/resnet18/cifar10 && \\
echo '===== aggregating =====' && \\
python3 experiments/scripts/aggregate_results.py \\
    --model resnet18 --dataset cifar10 \\
    --sparsities 0.5 0.7 \\
    --output-dir outputs/resnet18/cifar10 && \\
echo '===== DONE ====='
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -e PYTHONPATH=/workspace/src mase-dev-kd \\
  bash -c '
    set -e
    for s in 0.5 0.7 0.85; do
      echo "========================================"
      echo "Starting CIFAR-10 full run: sparsity=$s"
      echo "========================================"
      python3 -m mase_kd.runners.run_pipeline \\
        --model resnet18 --dataset cifar10 --profile full --sparsity $s --seed 0
      echo "Finished sparsity=$s"
    done
    echo "All CIFAR-10 full runs complete."
  ' 2>&1)
